ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Pixelle has an eye for style and all the high scores. Create your own gaming rec room with the Pixelle Starter Pack.</>

<text color="F3DE0C">Includes</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
<text color="F3DE0C">Decor Items are available in your LEGO® Fortnite Build Menu after purchase, and require resources to be built in Survival worlds. Decor Items can be placed after you have met the Survival world progression requirements.</>

<text color="F3DE0C">Note: Back Blings, Pickaxes, Gliders and Wraps are not available in LEGO Fortnite.</>

<text color="F3DE0C">These cosmetics grant no competitive advantage. LEGO® Fortnite content can be placed in your own and up to 8 other friends' worlds per week. You must gather all required ingredients before building and placing the content in Survival Mode. For limitations of cosmetic usage, see fn.gg/cosmetics.</>
